memory_text: User bought an iPhone 13 Pro from Best Buy on Black Friday for $800 (regular price $1,000). The user attended the annual Holiday Market at the local mall a week before Black Friday.
I bought my iPhone 13 Pro on Black Friday at Best Buy for $800 (regular price $1,000). I attended the annual Holiday Market at the local mall a week before Black Friday.

I attended the annual Holiday Market at the local mall a week before Black Friday and saw some unique handmade jewelry. I got my iPhone 13 Pro at a discounted price of $800 from Best Buy on Black Friday (regular price $1,000). I also bought a 4K TV from Amazon on Cyber Monday at 30% off the original price of $1,200.
User went to Hawaii with family for a week last month and loved it.

User took a week-long family trip to Hawaii last month (May 2023) and loved it. They're now planning a return trip to the Big Island (Kailua-Kona area) and asked about accommodations, coffee farm tours, and a day trip to Hilo.
